title: PCB Parts Research
description: Finds KiCad symbol and footprint for any component: searches local library, then SnapEDA, then creates custom from datasheet. Produces a verified parts checklist before returning lib_id strings.
context: Uses pcb_search_lib (local), pcb_search_web (SnapEDA), and kicad-create-custom-footprint skill. Requires vision for datasheet verification. All downloaded footprints are verified before use.
